TypeSignature.Value: .class public auto ansi sealed SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp extends System.Enum

Docs.summary: Specifies the transfer function component of a CICP color space descriptor.

remarks.format:
## Remarks
`SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp` specifies the transfer function (opto-electronic or electro-optical) component of a CICP (Coding-Independent Code Points) color space descriptor, as defined in ITU-T H.273. The transfer function describes how linear light values are encoded to or decoded from a signal.
Use this enumeration with <xref:SkiaSharp.SKColorSpace.CreateCicp(SkiaSharp.SKColorspacePrimariesCicp,SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp)> to create a color space from CICP descriptors.
## Examples
```csharp var colorSpace = SKColorSpace.CreateCicp( SKColorspacePrimariesCicp.Rec2020, SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp.Pq); ```

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Hlg = int32(18)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2100 Hybrid Log-Gamma (HLG) transfer function for HDR broadcasting (CICP value 18).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196621 = int32(13)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-1 transfer function, also known as sRGB (CICP value 13).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Iec6196624 = int32(11)

Docs.summary: IEC 61966-2-4 transfer function (xvYCC) for extended-gamut video (CICP value 11).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Linear = int32(8)

Docs.summary: A linear (gamma 1.0) transfer function with no electro-optical conversion (CICP value 8).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Pq = int32(16)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 2084 Perceptual Quantizer (PQ) transfer function for HDR content (CICP value 16).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202010bit = int32(14)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 10-bit content (CICP value 14).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec202012bit = int32(15)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.2020 transfer function for 12-bit content (CICP value 15).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemBg = int32(5)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System BG transfer function, associated with legacy PAL and SECAM gamma (CICP value 5).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec470SystemM = int32(4)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.470 System M transfer function, associated with legacy NTSC gamma (CICP value 4).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec601 = int32(6)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.601 transfer function for standard-definition digital television (CICP value 6).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Rec709 = int32(1)

Docs.summary: ITU-R BT.709 transfer function, used for standard and high-definition television (CICP value 1).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt240 = int32(7)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 240 transfer function, used in early HDTV production (CICP value 7).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp SmpteSt4281 = int32(17)

Docs.summary: SMPTE ST 428-1 transfer function for digital cinema (CICP value 17).

MemberSignature.Value: .field public static literal valuetype SkiaSharp.SKColorspaceTransferFnCicp Unknown = int32(0)

Docs.summary: An unspecified or unknown transfer function (CICP value 0).
